# GitHub Repository Naming Suggestions

## AI powered naming suggestions for your GitHub repositories

74 followers

## AI powered naming suggestions for your GitHub repositories

74 followers

Visit website

Let AI suggest namings for your GitHub repositories. Open any public repo on GitHub, and use the extension as a client to prompt OpenAI for naming suggestions using the GitHub repository's description and your OpenAI API key.

hey @devidw I suggest you create a simple website with the feature of generating name based on description, its easier to get started.

Report

David Wolf

GitHub Repository Naming Suggestions

GitHub Repository Naming Suggestions

Maker

@sonimadhuri thanks for your suggestion. Note, also on a website you would still have to enter your OpenAI API key, since the service is made available without the OpenAI app review process, which is only valid when it's an open-source application plus the user's API key is used and not the developer's key.

Report

David Wolf

GitHub Repository Naming Suggestions

GitHub Repository Naming Suggestions

Maker [...] that's exactly what you can do with the naming suggestion service, you can visit anybody's public GitHub repository and use the open-source browser extension I created to generate a list of meaningful naming suggestions for the viewed repo. The naming suggestions are generated by the powerful AI from OpenAI. This is the same service GitHub uses for their Copilot product to generate code suggestions (since the extension is completely open-source and free to use and OpenAI is a paid service, you need to sign up on OpenAI  to get your API key). In the naming service, AI is prompted to use the repo description to build up names, so we can focus on describing and don't have a hard time breaking down all our thoughts into a single word or word combination. Once generated, you can take any name
